Pistol.title: Pistol
Pistol.description: A semi-automatic handgun designed for quick firing. Excellent for basic personal protection.

Revolver.title: Revolver
Revolver.description: A powerful handgun with a revolving cylinder.

LeverActionRifle.title: Lever Action Rifle
LeverActionRifle.description: A rifle that uses a lever mechanism to load cartridges.

AssaultRifle.title: Assault Rifle
AssaultRifle.description: A rapid-fire rifle designed for military use.

SubMachineGun.title: Submachine Gun
SubMachineGun.description: A lightweight automatic firearm designed for close-quarters combat.

Shotgun.title: Shotgun
Shotgun.description: A firearm that is designed to be fired from the shoulder, using shells containing multiple small pellets.
